what_it_does: Records a channel attachment entry that links attachment att-3ac0c0d1 in the dragnet-development channel to board item item-102f0e71, with an added timestamp.
observations: YAML front-matter file with no body content.
Fields include id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
attachment_type is 'board_items' and target uses a board:// URI scheme.
The added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter with '---' delimiters.
ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit UTC offset.
concerns: No description or context for why this attachment was added.
Target board item is referenced by opaque URI with no title or summary.
notes: A bare metadata stub that records a link between a channel attachment and a board item, but carries no explanatory content.
questions: What content or artifact does attachment att-3ac0c0d1 represent?
What is the significance of board item item-102f0e71?
Is the target URI resolvable elsewhere in the ledger?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears to serve as an attachment-to-board-item index record; its actual content is limited to identifiers and a timestamp, which matches a minimal indexing purpose but lacks descriptive context.
intention_signals: It is trying to preserve the fact that a channel attachment was associated with a specific board item at a particular time, likely for traceability or searchability across channel and board workspaces.
contribution: Provides a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment identifier and a board item identifier, which a fused system could use to reconstruct cross-tool references.
summary_for_embedding: A metadata-only channel attachment record linking att-3ac0c0d1 in dragnet-development to board item item-102f0e71 with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel attachment was attached to a board item for later cross-reference.
